title: 2Pack Vacuum Storage Bags for Clothes, 50x70cm Space Saver Vacuum Cubes Packing Bags, Travel Essentials Sealer Compression Bags, Storage Bags Vacuum Sealed for Travel Clothes Pillows Blankets Storage
features: You will get: 2pcs vacuum storage bags with dimensions of 50x70cm/19.68 X 27.56inch, which can compress and store blankets, comforters, clothes, pillows, and more. These bags prevent air from entering or leaking, keeping your stored items dry and clean. The storage bags are reusable. Please note that the product does not include a vacuum pump.

Strong Seal: Our vacuum storage bags feature a double zipper seal design and multiple sealing turbo valves. This enhanced sealing prevents other gases from entering or leaking, keeping your clothes away from moisture and odors. When you take them out, they will still be fresh and clean.

Premium Materials: The vacuum storage bags are made of high-quality plastic that prevents air from entering or leaking. They are sturdy, durable, space-saving, and easy to clean. The bags are made of multiple layers of plastic, providing flexibility and durability to withstand repeated use.

Easy to Use: The must-have travel item, these compression bags make it easy for you to organize your clothes whether you're traveling or at home. They help you solve these troubles effortlessly and free up a significant amount of space. Especially during a move, you won't need to carry additional suitcases, and the transparent bags allow you to easily find the items you need at a glance. They are a helpful assistant in your daily life.

Space-saving: The vacuum storage bags are compatible with any vacuum cleaner, making them incredibly convenient. They are a little trick to expand storage space in your wardrobe, closet, garage, basement, attic, and suitcase, allowing you to store more items in the same space.
